mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_id, modality, report_text, file_id, source_system, examined_at, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM imaging_report WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO imaging_report ( tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_id, modality, report_text, file_id, source_system, examined_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{encounterId}, #{modality}, #{reportText}, #{fileId}, #{sourceSystem}, #{examinedAt} )
